SELECT index, h3IsResClassIII(index) AS res FROM h3_indices WHERE res = 1;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_indices) AS index_count SELECT index_count AS total_indices, h3IsResClassIII(index) FROM h3_indices;
CREATE TABLE other_indices (index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY index;
SELECT a.index, h3IsResClassIII(a.index) FROM h3_indices AS a JOIN other_indices AS b ON a.index = b.index;
SELECT h3IsResClassIII(index) FROM (SELECT index FROM h3_indices WHERE index > 0) AS subquery;
SELECT h3IsResClassIII(index), count() OVER (PARTITION BY h3IsResClassIII(index)) AS count FROM h3_indices;
SELECT DISTINCT h3IsResClassIII(index) FROM (SELECT index FROM h3_indices WHERE index < 18446744073709551615) AS subquery;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW h3_class_view ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() AS SELECT index, h3IsResClassIII(index) AS res FROM h3_indices GROUP BY index;
SELECT res FROM h3_class_view WHERE res = 1;
